name: testup.az
description: Skills for interacting with testup.az, an online exam platform for teachers and students.

skills.name: exam-authoring
skills.description: Create, update and publish exams on testup.az through its HTTP API, as a teacher account.

skills.name: platform-overview
skills.description: What testup.az is, which pages and APIs are public, and the rules an agent must follow when interacting with it.
